'''Squinn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] and a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]]. He was the commander of the ''[[Galactic Voyager]]'' when the warship fought at the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]]. At the time, the ship was acting as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] during and after the engagement.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
